description_long: This hammer features a robust, double-sided metal head with a dark, weathered finish, giving it a rugged and heavy-duty appearance. The head is broad and symmetrical, with two large, flat striking faces, suggesting it is a double-bit or battle axe-style hammer rather than a typical claw or sledgehammer. The handle is crafted from a twisted, textured wood, providing both visual interest and a secure grip, and it appears to be securely fastened to the head with a wrap or binding at the joint. The wood is dark brown, with visible grain and a slightly irregular, hand-carved look, enhancing its rustic character. No visible brand markings or logos are present on the hammer, and the surfaces appear clean and free from significant wear or damage. The overall design suggests a tool that is both functional and decorative, suitable for display or use in demanding tasks.
description: A heavy, double-sided metal hammer with a twisted wooden handle and a rugged, weathered finish. The design is robust and decorative, with no visible wear or branding.
description_view_0: Front view shows the broad, double-sided metal head and the twisted wooden handle, with the binding at the joint clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the thickness of the metal head and the pointed end, with the handle appearing narrow and the binding prominent.
description_view_2: Rear view mirrors the front, showing the symmetrical double-sided head and the full length of the twisted handle.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displays the head's thickness and the handle's curvature, with the binding and pointed end visible.
attribute_handle_type: Twisted wooden handle with a textured, hand-carved appearance, providing a secure and ergonomic grip.
attribute_head_type: Double-sided, broad metal head resembling a battle axe or double-bit hammer, with two large striking faces and a central binding.
